title: Therapy
html:
Therapy

Stub. Recurring todo-item in Yahir's fall-2021 transition notes — "go to Options for therapy" in 2021 08 11 fall todo cluster and "establish therapy" in 2021 10 19 fix glasses fafsa todo two months later. The repeated re-listing across notes suggests it stayed an open intent rather than executed action through fall 2021.

  • 2021 10 19 fix glasses fafsa todo
